Title: Reliance Foundation Scholarship
Description: The Reliance Foundation Scholarship program aims to support meritorious students in pursuing higher education in technology and engineering fields.
Requirements: Minimum CGPA of 8.0, No active backlogs, Family income below 8 lakhs per annum

Title: Women Techmakers Fellowship
Description: Google's Women Techmakers program provides scholarships to women studying computer science, computer engineering, or closely related technical fields.
Requirements: Strong academic performance, Leadership qualities, Active participation in computer science-related activities

Title: AICTE Smart India Fellowship
Department: CSE, IT, ECE, EEE, MECH, CIVIL
Description: Fellowship program for students working on innovative projects that solve real-world problems.
Requirements: Innovative project idea, Letter of recommendation, CGPA > 7.5

Title: UNESCO Women in Science Fellowship
Department: CSE, IT, ECE, EEE, MECH, CIVIL
Description: Fellowship program to support women researchers in STEM fields.
Requirements: Research proposal, Academic excellence, Letter of recommendation

Title: Adobe India’s Women in Tech Scholarship
Department: CSE, IT, ECE, Data Science, Math
Stipend: Full tuition fee funding and internship
Eligibility: Female students enrolled in 4-year BE/B.Tech or integrated ME/MS/MTech programs
Description: The Adobe India Women in Tech Scholarship provides funding for female students pursuing technical degrees in India and offers mentorship, internship, and access to career development opportunities.
Requirements: Must be enrolled in a 4-year BE/B.Tech program or an integrated ME/MS/MTech program, Should be pursuing a major in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, Electrical/Electronics Engineering, Math, or Computing, Must be completing the program in 2024

Title: Nutanix Advancing Women in Technology Scholarship Program
Eligibility: Students pursuing degrees in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or Software Engineering
Description: The Nutanix Advancing Women in Technology Scholarship supports women pursuing undergraduate or graduate degrees in technical fields.
Requirements: Must be enrolled as a full-time student, Must be pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or Software Engineering, Minimum GPA of 3.0

Title: Pragati Scholarship (Women)
Description: The Pragati Scholarship aims to assist meritorious women pursuing technical education from economically weaker sections of society.
Requirements: Female students pursuing technical education, From economically weaker sections

Title: Amazon Future Engineer Scholarship (Women)
Eligibility: Female students pursuing B.E. or B.Tech in Computer Science or related fields
Description: The Amazon Future Engineer Scholarship supports first-year female students in India pursuing undergraduate degrees in Computer Science Engineering and related disciplines.
Requirements: Indian citizen, First-year students of B.E. or B.Tech in Computer Science or related fields, Annual family income less than INR 3.0 Lakh
